prompt: I have a termbase at test-fixtures/termbase.csv produced by a terminology audit. Render it into an AGENTS.md vocabulary fragment I can paste into my repo's agent context, and also give me the compact spec preamble block. Save the fragment as agents-fragment.md and the preamble as spec-preamble.md.
assertions: All 8 termbase terms appear in the fragment (extend mode, project-local schema, config.yaml, schema registry, merge policy, validation pass, spec preamble, draft proposal)
Entries are imperative prose, not a markdown table
Declared transforms are present: extendMode, extend-mode, --extend-mode, EXTEND_MODE, projectLocalSchema, SchemaRegistry, mergePolicy
No invented transforms: the strings validationPass, specPreamble, validation_pass, spec_preamble do not appear
Banned variants are stated as prohibitions (e.g. never 'extension mode' / 'inherit mode')
draft proposal (status candidate) is marked as pending/non-binding, not rendered as an enforced entry
Every entry carries a source citation to a termbase row
